content.en:
Absolute Martial Arts.

Ye Tian began to retreat and practice penance in his mansion and began to create invincible ancestral skills.

Of course, the Invincible Ancestral Technique was not created out of thin air, at least there was a direction.

And Ye Tian was going to combine his own supreme ancestral skills with the eternal rules of strength to create a top-notch invincible ancestral technique, such as the supreme ancestral technique of hegemony, the extreme arm supreme ancestral technique, and other supreme ancestral techniques involving strength.

Absorbing the advantages of these supreme ancestral techniques, coupled with the application of the eternal rules of power, it finally turned into an invincible ancestral technique.

It is difficult to comprehend the eternal rules, but it will take a lot of time to create the invincible ancestral technique after comprehending the eternal rules, but it will be successful in the end.

With Ye Tian's comprehension and comprehension of the eternal rules of power, as well as the possession of the power of the eternal ancestral endowment, it naturally would not take too long to create an invincible ancestral skill.

In the blink of an eye, the Ten Realm Era passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally succeeded in creating an invincible ancestral technique, and it was an invincible ancestral technique that far surpassed the ordinary fifth-rank invincible person, after all, he had also seen the invincible ancestral skill of the invincible person of the Heavenly Wind Sea, which was far inferior to the invincible ancestral technique he created.

Ye Tian named this invincible ancestral skill Tianji Combat Technique, which was the ultimate development of strength, and used the eternal rules of power, if he did not have a high enough understanding of the eternal rules of power, he would not be able to perform this invincible ancestral skill at all.

Once the Heavenly Pole Combat Technique is cast, the strength of the body will skyrocket many times, and the whole body will be like a killing weapon, killing everything.

At the moment when the Heavenly Pole Combat Technique was comprehended, Ye Tian had a kind of realization that he could break through at any time with the help of the Heavenly Pole Combat Technique, but he could only let one of the main body or the copy body break through, and he couldn't let both break through, which was the restriction of the rules.

And so.

Ye Tian let the body break through.

Bang!!!!

The main body began to transform under the influence of the invincible ancestral technique of the Tianji Battle Technique, which was equivalent to fusing the invincible ancestral technique, and the physical body underwent a qualitative change.

Suddenly, under the influence of a certain force in the underworld, countless origin powers descended from the Source Sea to the Dark Forbidden Domain, pouring into Ye Tian's body, helping Ye Tian complete his transformation.

The origin of the source sea is almost impossible to refine, but at this moment, under the inexplicable influence, it has turned into an origin that is easy to refine, which is the benefit of realm breakthrough.

Breaking through from a sixth-rank invincible person to a fifth-rank invincible, the improvement brought by the qualitative change is too great, and Ye Tian has cultivated the top invincible body robbery Wanyuan Return to the Ruins, and it is the first consummation realm of the perfect body, plus the invincible ancestral skill created is the top invincible ancestral skill.

Therefore, this breakthrough, Ye Tian's strength has undergone earth-shaking changes.

After a long time, Ye Tian completed the breakthrough and officially stepped into the realm of the fifth-rank invincible ancestor.

"My current strength far surpasses that of the ordinary fifth-rank invincible ancestor, it is said that the mysterious leaders of the Calamity Black Mountain and the Firmament Sword Tomb are fifth-rank invincibles, but if I want to kill them, I am afraid that I can be pinched to death at will!" Ye Tian muttered.

This is not hubris, but fact.

When he was a sixth-rank invincible, his strength was already comparable to that of a powerful fifth-rank invincible, and now he has broken through to a fifth-rank invincible, and he has created a top-notch invincible ancestral skill, and his strength has increased many times, I am afraid that compared with the weaker fourth-rank invincible, it is not much weaker.

The requirement to become a fourth-class invincible is to cultivate to a very high level and create at least three invincible skills, so that you can be called a fourth-class invincible.

Cultivation is the easiest to improve, and it can be accumulated slowly over a long period of time, in case it is difficult to achieve three invincible skills.

Moreover, these three invincible skills are not the same type of invincible skills, if they are the same type of invincible skills, such as all power-type invincible skills, then such an invincible person cannot become a fourth-class invincible, even if ten invincible ancestral skills of the same kind are created, they can only be called pseudo-fourth-class invincibles.

Only because the same kind of invincible skills create a second door, it is not of much help to improve the strength, and it is difficult to change the quality of the physical body, only to comprehend other eternal rules, comprehend more than three eternal rules, and create three different types of invincible skills, can cause three qualitative changes in the physical body, and finally step into the realm of the fourth-class invincible.

It takes more time to go from a fifth-class invincible to a fourth-class invincible, and it will not even reach it in a lifetime.

Because some invincible people only have comprehension of one eternal rule, but no comprehension of other eternal rules, plus they have spent endless years and countless resources in order to comprehend one eternal rule, it is almost an extravagant hope to comprehend two eternal rules.

As a result, many fifth-rank invincible people in the Heavenly Wind Sea had cultivated for endless years, and they could not be promoted to fourth-rank invincibles.

But for Ye Tian, it was really not difficult to be promoted to a fourth-class invincible.

He possessed a variety of Eternal Talents, so he could easily comprehend the Eternal Rules of a Gate, and that was his advantage.

Now, Ye Tian's problem is instead to accumulate cultivation and cultivate the Ten Thousand Sources to Return to the Ruins, but these two aspects take a long time.

"Take your time, first re-condense a replica body, let the replica body start to cultivate the second layer of Wanyuan Guiru, and improve Wanyuan Guiru step by step, and the ontology focuses on improving cultivation. Then, occasionally go to Jiuyang Mountain to visit Jiuyang fish. Ye Tian planned.

However, before doing this, Ye Tian was ready to attack some robbers.

Before, he was constantly looking for robber beasts, and he also encountered some robber beasts that were not too powerful, but before he couldn't kill those robber beasts, but now that he has cultivated to a fifth-rank invincible, he is naturally sure to kill these robber beasts.

Basically, as long as there are one or two hundred eons of tribulation beasts, he is sure to kill them, as for the five hundred eons or so of the tribulation beasts, he can only be evenly matched, and more than one thousand tribulation beasts, he is not an opponent.

And so.

Ye Tian let the copy body start to attack these beasts.

Bao'an Tiandi.

Ye Tian descended here, the tribulation beast here is only one hundred and eighteen tribulations, although Bao'an Heaven and Earth is not a catastrophe now, but even if Ye Tian has been suppressed by heaven and earth with a lot of strength, he is still sure to kill this calamity beast.

He didn't want to wait until the time of the Bao'an Heaven and Earth Tribulation to deal with this robbery beast, it would take a long time, and he didn't have that much patience to wait.

Rumble!!!!

After Ye Tian descended, the rules and origin of Bao'an Heaven and Earth were suppressed, and his strength was weakened by at least seventy percent at once, leaving only thirty percent of his strength.

But even if he only has thirty percent strength, he still far surpasses the average fifth-class invincible.

Soon, Ye Tian found the robber beast and shattered the space-time node where the other party was located with one blow.

Click!!

The huge beast appeared, staring at Ye Tian angrily, he recognized Ye Tian, he came to disturb him last time, and was hit hard by him, but he didn't expect it to come again this time.

Seeing this robbing beast, Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly opened the invincible ancestral technique Tianji Battle Technique.

Suddenly, Ye Tian's physical strength skyrocketed, and his entire body also underwent tremendous changes, turning into an incomparably terrifying existence.

Then, Ye Tian held a medium-grade robbery weapon long knife and slashed at this robbery beast.

Poof!

The body of the beast was cut out of a huge wound by Ye Tian, and countless blood flowed out.

Kill!

The two sides fought.

In a short time, Ye Tian relied on his invincible robbery body and the robbery weapon long knife in his hand to kill this robbery beast.

This is just the beginning.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to hunt and kill the robber beasts, and in a short period of time, he hunted and killed thirteen robber beasts.

As for the other beasts, he was not sure, unless he went farther to the source sea territory to find the foreign world.

But for Ye Tian, the current gains were enough for him to cultivate for a long time without worrying about lack of resources.

Therefore, Ye Tian suspended hunting and killing robber beasts.
